rules.name: High Customer Experience Risk
rules.reason: Customer experience risk score exceeds threshold indicating potential crisis.

rules.name: High Support Ticket Volume
rules.reason: Support tickets exceed the acceptable volume, indicating potential issues with the product.

rules.name: Low Customer Rating Indicator
rules.reason: Average customer rating is below the acceptable threshold, which may reflect dissatisfaction.

rules.name: Sentiment Mismatch Alert
rules.reason: There is a mismatch between social sentiment and customer reviews which may indicate perception issues.

rules.name: ROAS Underclaim Detected
rules.reason: Platform-reported ROAS is significantly lower than true ROAS, indicating potential underreporting.

rules.name: ROAS Overclaim Warning
rules.reason: Platform-reported ROAS is higher than true ROAS, risking inaccurate campaign interpretations.

rules.name: Negative Health Score Alert
rules.reason: Health score indicates subpar performance across key marketing, sales, and customer satisfaction metrics.

rules.name: High Refund Rate
rules.reason: Refund rate exceeds 5%, indicating potential dissatisfaction or return issues.

rules.name: Social to Acquisition Rate Problem
rules.reason: Low conversion rate from social reach to acquisitions signals ineffective use of social platforms.

rules.name: Inventory Managed Check
rules.reason: Inventory confirmations are incomplete, possibly affecting product availability and sales.

rules.name: Social Reach and Impact Alert
rules.reason: Social media reach below 1 million may indicate insufficient brand penetration in markets.

rules.name: NPS Success Indicator
rules.reason: Maintaining a high NPS should be monitored for ensuring strong customer advocacy and satisfaction.
